# Payment Fraud Prevention: Quick Pivots and Proactive Planning

# Payment Fraud Prevention: Quick Pivots and Proactive Planning

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

This whitepaper from Sift and The Fraud Practice details how to stop payment fraud attacks as they hit—while building the foundation for proactive fraud prevention with strategic planning, intelligent automation, and real-time data. Explore the two main requirements of a successful payment fraud prevention strategy: responding to fraud attacks immediately, and building an effective long-term strategy that evolves with your business.

### Read the whitepaper

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
